title: CoNews Advertiser Campaign Kit

publicOffer.headline: Reach your town before the weekend.
publicOffer.subhead: Sponsor local news, events, visitor guides, and Shop Local discovery across Colorado News Press town sites.

creativeSpecs.copy: 80 to 140 character headline, one short body paragraph, one CTA

safetyRules: No private rates in public kit.
No customer data in static files.
No unreviewed claims about reach or audience size.
No regulated category claims without category review.
acceptanceCriteria: Advertiser kit explains tiers, creative specs, CTA, and reporting promise.
Kit routes to reviewed onboarding path.
No secrets, private pricing, or customer data are published.
